data.title: Revolution Medicines to Present Updated Phase 1/2 Clinical Data for Daraxonrasib in First Line Metastatic Pancreatic Cancer Across Monotherapy and Combination Cohorts at the 2026 AACR Annual Meeting
data.description: On April 21, 2026, Revolution Medicines, Inc., a company listed as Nasdaq: RVMD and based in Redwood City, California, shared updated clinical information on daraxonrasib. This oral RAS(ON) multi-selective inhibitor is being studied in two Phase 1/2 trials for patients with untreated metastatic pancreatic ductal adenocarcinoma (PDAC). The data includes findings from a combination cohort and a monotherapy cohort. The information will be discussed at the American Association for Cancer Research (AACR) Annual Meeting, with the combination cohort being a part of a late-breaking mini-symposium and the monotherapy cohort being presented at a poster session.

data.title: Mativ Announces Conference Call to Discuss First Quarter 2026 Results
data.description: Mativ Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: MATV) based in Alpharetta, Georgia, shared plans to unveil its Q1 2026 financial results on May 6, 2026, following the market closure. They have arranged a conference call for discussing these outcomes at 8:30 a.m. ET on May 7, 2026. Investors can tune in to the call through webcast or telephone. The company will make an online replay of the call available on the Investors section of their website at ir.mativ.com soon after the webcast for those unable to join the live discussion.

data.title: Revolution Medicines to Present Preclinical Data on Innovative Mutant-Targeted Catalytic RAS(ON) Inhibitor at the 2026 AACR Annual Meeting
data.description: Research findings demonstrate that RM-055 has shown promising efficacy in overcoming resistance and delivering substantial and long-lasting antitumor effects in preclinical models. Specifically, RM-055 has displayed notable effectiveness in combating pancreatic ductal adenocarcinoma, non-small cell lung cancer, and colorectal cancer. These results signal the potential of RM-055 as a robust treatment option for various types of cancer, emphasizing its ability to tackle tumors that are typically challenging to treat.

data.title: National Healthcare Properties Announces Pricing of Public Offering
data.description: National Healthcare Properties, Inc. (NHP) disclosed on April 21, 2026, its successful pricing of a public offering involving 38,500,000 shares of its Class A common stock at $12.00 per share. The trading of NHP's Class A common stock on The Nasdaq Global Market is set to commence on April 22, 2026, under the symbol “NHP”. The offering is scheduled to conclude on April 23, 2026, pending standard closing conditions. Moreover, NHP has provided the underwriters with a 30-day option to acquire up to an extra 5,775,000 shares of its Class A common stock to address any overallotments.

data.title: CORRECTED HEADLINE: First Farmers Financial Corp. Announces Two-for-One Stock Split
data.description: In Converse, Indiana, on April 21, 2026, First Farmers Financial Corp. issued a statement correcting a previous release. The earlier release on April 21, 2026, inaccurately stated that the headline should be "First Farmers Financial Corp. Declares Record Dividend." However, the correct headline is "First Farmers Financial Corp. Announces Two-for-One Stock Split." This correction clarifies the company's announcement regarding a stock split, not a dividend declaration.

data.title: Zymeworks Presents New Phase 1 Data for ZW191, a Folate Receptor Alpha-Targeting ADC at AACR Annual Meeting 2026
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia on April 21, 2026, Zymeworks Inc. (Nasdaq: ZYME) shared updates at the 2026 American Association for Cancer Research (AACR) Annual Meeting. The biotechnology company reported findings from the dose-escalation segment of the Phase 1 trial for ZW191, an antibody-drug conjugate (ADC) that targets folate receptor alpha (FRα). Zymeworks Inc. is known for managing a range of licensed healthcare assets and developing a varied pipeline of innovative biotherapeutics.

data.title: BBOT Presents Preclinical Data Showing RAS:PI3Kα Breaker BBO-10203 Inhibits PI3Kα/AKT Signaling in HER2AMP Models at the AACR Annual Meeting 2026
data.description: BBO-10203 has been found to disrupt the interaction between RAS and PI3Kα through physical and allosteric mechanisms. This disruption results in the inhibition of signaling without affecting the kinase activity of PI3Kα. Importantly, this inhibition occurs without causing hyperglycemia. This discovery opens up new possibilities for targeted therapies, with the compound showing promising potential for further development.

data.title: In HelloNation, Home Insurance Expert Glenda Martinez of Silver Spring, MD, Explains Water Damage and Sewer Backup Coverage
data.description: In Silver Spring, Maryland on April 21, 2026, a recent article by HelloNation delves into the coverage provided by a typical homeowner's insurance policy when faced with water damage. This article is particularly relevant for Maryland residents who may not be aware of potential gaps in their current coverage. By examining this topic, the article aims to provide clarity for homeowners in the state, helping them understand the extent of protection offered by their insurance policies when it comes to water damage.

data.title: Matrix Service Company Sets Dates for Release of Third Quarter Fiscal 2026 Financial Results and Conference Call
data.description: In Tulsa, Oklahoma, on April 21, 2026, Matrix Service Company (Nasdaq: MTRX), known for its engineering and construction services in the energy and industrial sectors, revealed plans to unveil its third quarter Fiscal 2026 financial results post-market hours on Wednesday, May 6, 2026.

data.title: Liberty Defense Announces Pricing of its U.S. Initial Public Offering
data.description: Wilmington, Massachusetts, April 21, 2026 - Liberty Defense Holdings Ltd. announced the pricing of its initial public offering in the US, consisting of 3,673,638 common shares at $4.50 per share and pre-funded warrants for 770,807 common shares at $4.4999 per warrant. These transactions are expected to generate gross proceeds of around $20 million for Liberty, excluding expenses. Additionally, the underwriters have been granted a 30-day option to purchase up to 666,666 additional common shares to address over-allotments. Liberty's TSXV listing is SCAN.

data.title: From IVF Science to Skin Longevity: AV Laboratories Translates Biotechnology into Breakthrough Skincare
data.description: AV Laboratories in New York is revolutionizing the skincare industry with their innovative approach. Leveraging over 30 years of biotechnology research, they have developed clinically backed skincare products suitable for daily use. Specializing in IVF and stem cell technologies, the company is at the forefront of a new frontier in molecular skincare, aiming to promote skin longevity on a cellular level. Their groundbreaking AVL SOM3® complex, a patented formulation, stands as a testament to their commitment to cutting-edge science in skincare.

data.title: ERI’s John Shegerian Describes the Evolving Circular Economy at 2026 ITAD Europe Conference
data.description: In Nice, France, John Shegerian, Chairman and CEO of ERI, a prominent provider of material resource recovery, ITAD, mobility services, and data destruction, as well as the largest electronics recycler in the nation, took part in the keynote panel discussion on the circular economy at the ITAD Europe conference. The event, held at the Oceanice Convention Centre, featured Shegerian alongside Darrell Fleming-Kendall, Executive Director of the Global ITAD Alliance. This marked the opening session of the conference, which attracted a significant audience in the industry.

data.title: River Valley Community Bancorp Announces Financial Results (Unaudited) for the Quarter Ended March 31, 2026, and Quarterly Dividend
data.description: River Valley Community Bancorp, along with its subsidiary River Valley Community Bank, headquartered in Yuba City, California, disclosed unaudited financial results for the quarter ending March 31, 2026. The Bank, trading under OTC markets as RVCB, declared a dividend of $0.07 per common share. Shareholders as of April 30, 2026, will receive the dividend on May 18, 2026. Further details can be accessed on the Bank’s Investor Relations website.

data.title: Sunwest Bank Has Entered into a Definitive Agreement to Acquire the Former MidWestOne and Bank of Denver Branches from Nicolet National Bank
data.description: In a recent announcement, Sunwest Bank, renowned as the Bank for Entrepreneurs by Entrepreneurs, disclosed its definitive agreement to acquire the previous MidWestOne and Bank of Denver branches from Nicolet National Bank. This strategic acquisition marks a significant milestone in Sunwest's expansion plans as it positions itself to broaden its reach. The deal signifies a positive growth trajectory for Sunwest Bank and highlights its commitment to serving a larger customer base.
